Outcome Stories
Impact narratives from implementation of the ASCC Blueprint 2025
👩‍💼Goal 5
GENDER EQUALITY · LABOUR
Empowering Women in ASEAN Labour Markets
Through targeted capacity building, female participation in senior management roles increased across 7 AMS during the 2021–2025 workplan period...
Read more →
🌱Goal 8
CLIMATE · DISASTER RESILIENCE
ASEAN Green Innovation for Disaster Resilience
Cross-sectoral cooperation between ACDM and ASEAN Centre for Biodiversity led to nature-based solutions now deployed in 5 AMS...
Read more →
🎓Goal 3
EDUCATION · DIGITAL SKILLS
Digital Literacy Masterclass Across ASEAN
The ASEAN Digital Youth Masterclass reached 120,000+ young people across all 10 AMS, aligned to KPI E.1.17.19.a...
Read more →
